title: palicourea adusta
intro: Palicourea adusta is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the yellow root or yellow bark. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, including those caused by bacteria and viruses. In herbal preparations, Palicourea adusta is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
